_comment: Per-procedure inline image scenes (consultation → procedure → recovery). 3 varied, on-topic queries each; alt text is written into the sidecar for SEO/a11y. Distinct from the hero query in treatment-image-queries.json.

gastric-bypass.alt: Bariatric surgeon consulting a patient before gastric bypass in Korea
Laparoscopic gastric bypass surgery in a Korean operating room
Post-bariatric nutrition and healthy eating during gastric bypass recovery

cataract-surgery.alt: Ophthalmologist examining a patient before cataract surgery in Korea
Cataract surgery performed under an operating microscope
Patient with restored vision after cataract surgery in Korea
